backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for Legend X Esports, with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, and public functions to add, update, remove, and query both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags for mobile/PWA support, manifest and icon links, the React root div, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, display mode, theme colors, icons, and categories for installability on mobile devices.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background refresh strategy for GET requests, with cache versioning, old cache cleanup on activate, and an offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full app layout by rendering PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid covering Discipline, Excellence, Victory, and Brotherhood.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Presentational card component for a single announcement, displaying a formatted nanosecond timestamp, title, body excerpt, and a hover-revealed 'Read More' indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, a short description, social media icon links (X, Discord, WhatsApp, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the hero section with a looping SVG shooting animation (boy firing 1–3 bullet bursts with recoil, muzzle flash, smoke, and crosshair effects) built entirely from CSS keyframe animations.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu toggle that shows/hides on scroll with a backdrop blur effect.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays the News & Announcements section, fetching data via a custom hook and rendering loading skeletons, an error state, an empty state, or a grid of AnnouncementCard components.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a single player's card with their avatar image, role badge, and name, falling back to a default avatar on image load errors and applying hover animations.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the PWA, handling the native beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS, with session-based dismissal.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: React component that displays a roster/contact section, fetching team members via `useRoster` hook and rendering loading skeletons, error, empty, or a grid of `PlayerCard` components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing login/logout state and identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on announcements and roster members by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme, and utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component that composes Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections into a single full-page layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes using oklch color values.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking a pending feature request to fully revert the frontend to its Version 44 state, undoing changes from Versions 45 and 46.
